_note: American to British spelling map for automatic conversion of generated text. Matching is whole-word and case-insensitive, with the original case preserved. Only words in this map are ever changed, so names, technical terms, and code are left alone. Keys beginning with an underscore are metadata and are ignored by the loader.
_source: Generated from VarCon (Variant Conversion Info) by Kevin Atkinson and Benjamin Titze, http://wordlist.aspell.net/ . See NOTICE-VarCon.txt for the licence.
_prefers: British -ise forms (VarCon tag B), not the Oxford -ize forms (tag Z)
_excludes: noun/verb or context dependent words such as license, practice, meter, disk, story, draft, judgment, and the software word program; these are left to the dictionary flag
